case_title: TERENCE O'DONNELL VS. ROY CHOY LEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY O'DONNELL, TERENCE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ROY CHOY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF O'DONNELL, TERENCE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'DONNELL, TERENCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($30 SERVICE FEE) SERVED NOV-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ROY CHOY
ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER DENIED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'DONNELL, TERENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, ROY CHOY $267.11 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $297.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED NOV-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ROY CHOY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ROY CHOY
